question_text: The ratio of the perimeter of the boundary of the shaded portion to the perimeter of the whole figure is _______.
answer_explanation: The area of the board = 3 m × 2 m = 6 m2 = 6 × 10000 cm2 = 60000 cm2 And the area of cut out piece = 250 cm × 90 cm = 22500 cm2 ∴ The area of remaining piece = (60000 – 22500) cm2 = 37500 cm2 Thus, the required ratio = The area of cut out pieceThe area of remaining piece = 22500𝑐⁢𝑚237500𝑐⁢𝑚2 = 35 = 3 : 5 shaalaa.com Chapter 8: Ratio and Proportion - Exercise Chapter 8 Ratio and Proportion Exercise | Q 89. | Page 130 Question Bank with Solutions * ") * ") * ") * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * Question Paper Solutions * * * * * * * * * * * * Other Resources * * * * * ") * * * * * * © 2026 Shaalaa.com | | Share 0 0 0 0 0 Notifications #### Select a course CANCEL Login email: password: Log in Course * * * * * * * * * * ×
